title: Monsters Swarm
description: This mod makes minecraft monsters (zombies, skeletons) very aggressive and swarmy. This mod is a fork of the old and deprecated mod with the same name for newer versions of the game.
body:
**A fork of the old and deprecated mod with the same name for newer versions of the game.**

This mod makes minecraft monsters (zombies, skeletons) very aggressive and swarmy. This mod enhances the AI of Minecraft mobs. Monsters can attack from far away destroy walls on their way, build bridges and kill your animals. They can also destroy walls on their way (though slowly, depends on the material) or build bridges. Your base is no longer safe during the night. This mod changes blast-resistance from some blocks.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
This mod has just been ported and is quite raw in terms of documentation and design, expect improvements in the quality of environment development.
</details>
